nasb.text: Therefore let us not judge one another anymore, but rather determine this—not to put an obstacle or a stumbling block in a brother’s way.

esv.text: Therefore let us not pass judgment on one another any longer, but rather decide never to put a stumbling block or hindrance in the way of a brother.

cnv.text: 所以，我們不要再彼此批評了；倒要立定主意，決不作絆倒弟兄或使他跌倒的事。

ccb.text: 所以，我们不可再互相论断，要留心自己的言行，不要绊倒弟兄姊妹。

csbs.text: 所以，我们不要再彼此评断，倒要下定决心，不给弟兄放下绊跌物或绊脚石。
